meaning: adj.鏁欒偛瀛︾殑,鏁欏娉曠殑
examples: The school district provides training to help teachers improve their pedagogical methods.
Griffith's work presented a number of advantages for this particular pedagogical purpose.
What, if any, are the pedagogical implications of the current interest in global and domestic cultural relations?
He was previously a Director of Research at the Higher Pedagogical Institute HEP-BEJUNE in Bienne (Switzerland).
Or, I can see electronic gadgets as pedagogical assets just waiting to be harnessed.
